settings.title: What's Included
settings.value_5: Yes — cold, gentle cycle. Air dry.

settings.title: Chest Girth Guide
settings.hint: Measure chest at widest point (behind front legs). Not neck.

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Wash & Care
settings.content: Machine wash cold on a gentle cycle. Air dry only — do not tumble dry. Do not iron the reflective strips. Inspect clips before each use.

settings.name: Escape-Proof Fit
settings.description: Step-in vest design with dual adjustment straps. No backing out, no slipping.

settings.name: Adjustable Fit
settings.description: Dual adjustment straps fit the chest and neck independently without restricting movement.

settings.name: Set Included
settings.description: Matching leash in the box. No separate purchase. Everything coordinates.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
